meta.title: HUGGO — WhatsApp Ordering for Retailers | 0% Commission
meta.description: Turn WhatsApp into a sales channel for your store. AI assistant 24/7, 0% commission, live in minutes. Request a demo.

hero.title: Your customers order on WhatsApp. You keep every cent.
hero.subtitle: HUGGO gives your store its own AI assistant on WhatsApp. It takes orders, recommends your products, and keeps your customers coming back — 24/7. You're live in minutes.
hero.cta-secondary: I'm a distributor / network — Contact us
hero.micro-text: We'll call you within 24h · No commitment

benefits.title: What HUGGO changes for your business.

items.title: Keep 100% of your margins.
items.subtitle: Direct channel, zero commission
items.description: WhatsApp is a direct channel between you and your customers. No middleman platform, no commission. Your sales are yours.

items.title: A salesperson who never sleeps.
items.subtitle: AI assistant, 24/7
items.description: Your assistant takes orders, recommends your products, and follows up on abandoned carts. Even at 11 PM, even on Sundays.

items.title: Snap your menu, and you're set.
items.subtitle: Live in minutes
items.description: No developer, no training, no hardware. Take a photo of your menu or sync your POS system: HUGGO builds your assistant automatically.
items.proof: 0 to 30% of customer base digitized within 1 month.

items.title: WhatsApp, kiosk, POS, website: one single basket.
items.subtitle: Synchronized basket everywhere
items.description: Your customer starts an order on WhatsApp, modifies it in-store, pays however they like. Everything syncs in real time with your POS.
items.proof: Connected to major POS systems via HubRise and Orisha Distribution.

items.title: Retailers
items.description: Bakery, restaurant, caterer, grocery, wine shop, bar, décor, clothing — your AI assistant handles orders and builds loyalty with regulars.

items.title: Networks & Franchises
items.description: One AI assistant per location, one consolidated network view. Deploy HUGGO across 50, 200, or 500 locations at once.

items.title: Local authorities & Short supply chains
items.description: Local producers, mobile vendors, municipalities without nearby shops. HUGGO creates a direct WhatsApp sales channel — no infrastructure needed.

how-it-works-summary.title: Live in 4 steps.

steps.title: Find your store
steps.description: HUGGO locates your business on Google Business.

steps.title: Import your products
steps.description: Photo of your menu or direct sync from your POS.

steps.title: Your assistant is built
steps.description: AI sets up a personalized WhatsApp assistant for your store.

steps.title: Your customers start ordering
steps.description: Your number goes live on Google Business. Orders roll in.

how-it-works-summary.cta: See how it works in detail →

mascotte.text: Got a question? Message us on WhatsApp. We reply the way we like: fast and clear.

items.question: My customers aren't tech-savvy — they'll never use this.
items.answer: Your customers already use WhatsApp — it's on 95% of smartphones in France. Nothing to download, nothing to learn. They send a message, just like they do 50 times a day. The result: 60% of the customer base digitized in 3 months, including stores whose customers had never ordered online before.

items.question: WhatsApp is personal. Not for ordering.
items.answer: WhatsApp Business is the most widely used commercial messaging channel in the world. Your customers would rather send a message than call or stand in line. The numbers confirm it: 15 million orders processed through HUGGO since March 2025.

items.question: It's expensive — I already have a website.
items.answer: A website doesn't take orders automatically, recommend products, or follow up on abandoned carts. HUGGO does — 24/7, without hiring anyone. And unlike delivery platforms, zero commission on your sales. The result: +15 to +30% average basket increase.

items.question: I'm not a tech person — it sounds complicated.
items.answer: Setup takes minutes. Take a photo of your menu — the AI handles the rest. No hardware, no training, no developer. Your assistant is live the same day.

final-cta.title: Ready to take back control of your sales?
final-cta.subtitle: A 15-minute demo is all it takes to see HUGGO in action for your store.
